'''Zoochberry dumplings''' were a type of [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] that was made from [[Zoochberry/Legends|zoochberries]],<ref name="POTDS" /> a type of [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]],<ref name="GODV">''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]''</ref> and was [[Diet/Legends|edible]] for members of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. They were served by the [[Prophets of the Dark Side]], a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] cult, at a banquet held to celebrate a visit from the Hutt [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]]<ref name="POTDS" /> in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].<ref name="Date note">{{InsiderCite|23|Star Wars Publications Timeline|''Star Wars'' Publications Timeline}} establishes that the events of [[Prophets of the Dark Side (novel)|''Prophets of the Dark Side'']], including the appearance of [[Zoochberry/Legends|zoochberry]] dumplings, take place five [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which corresponds to [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> While eating the dumplings at the banquet, Zorba spilled some on the [[Robe/Legends|robes]] of the [[High Prophet]] [[Jedgar]], which left stains on his [[Clothing/Legends|clothes]].<ref name="POTDS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zoochberry dumplings appeared in [[Prophets of the Dark Side (novel)|''Prophets of the Dark Side'']], the sixth and final novel in the [[Adventures of a Jedi Prince|''Jedi Prince'']] series, written by [[Paul Davids]] and [[Hollace Davids]], and released in [[1993]].<ref name="POTDS" />
